name: Invoice Processing Automation
description: Watch a Gmail inbox for emails with PDF attachments, parse the invoice data using a PDF parser module, append a row to a Google Sheet, then send a Slack notification to your accounting channel.

config.label: INBOX
config.filter: has:attachment filename:*.pdf subject:(invoice OR receipt OR bill)

modules.notes: Replace with your own Gmail credentials and label.
Uses a free PDF parser. You can substitute with Adobe PDF Services or Parseur.
Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID with your Google Sheet ID from the URL.

config.text: :receipt: New invoice from *{{3.vendor}}* — Amount: *${{3.totalAmount}}* — Due: {{3.dueDate}}. <https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID|View in Sheets>

modules.notes: Optional: replace with email notification if you do not use Slack.

setupSteps: 1. Import this JSON into Make (go to Scenarios → Import Blueprint).
2. Connect your Gmail account in the Gmail module.
3. Create a Google Sheet with columns: Invoice #, Date, Vendor, Amount, Due Date, Subject, Status.
4. Connect your Google Sheets and replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID.
5. Connect your Slack workspace and set the correct channel.
6. Activate the scenario and set a schedule (e.g. every 15 minutes).
